title: OmniProject work-item vocabulary entry
description: One canonical work-item vocabulary token — a status or a priority — authored as a single JSON array (assets/work-vocabulary.json), validated element-by-element against this schema and embedded by gen-work-vocabulary. The lifecycle class applies to statuses only.

methodologies.description: Methodology tags this token belongs to ('*' = neutral / all). Selecting a methodology surfaces its tagged statuses, so each methodology can carry its own normal nomenclature. Absent ⇒ neutral.
